title: Distribution of beneficial insects with drone systems from the air
subtitle: Απελευθέρωση ωφέλιμων εντόμων με συστήματα drones από αέρος
description: A practical guide on using unmanned drones to release beneficial predatory insects over outdoor crops as part of Integrated Pest Management solutions. It outlines the operational advantages, including increased application speed, precision targeting, and reduced labor for producers.
